nasb.text: “Let us go up against Judah and terrorize it, and make for ourselves a breach in its walls and set up the son of Tabeel as king in the midst of it,”

esv.text: “Let us go up against Judah and terrify it, and let us conquer it for ourselves, and set up the son of Tabeel as king in the midst of it,”

cnv.text: “我們可以上去攻打猶大，擾亂她，把她攻佔過來，歸我們所有，又在其中立他比勒的兒子作王。”

ccb.text: 企图攻打并瓜分犹大，改立他比勒的儿子为王。

csbs.text: “让我们上去攻击犹大，恐吓它，攻破它归我们，并在其中立塔比勒的儿子为王”，
